name: Tom Yum Gai
recipeInstructions:
(Thai Chicken in Lemon Grass Soup)
To make Pepper and Coriander Paste:
1. In a dry skillet, dry roast about 1 tablespoon whole black peppercorns for a minute or two.
2. Transfer to a blender and blend until smooth.
3. Add garlic, lemon juice, salt, coriander, pepper, and coriander paste; blend again.
4. Use about 1 teaspoon of the paste in Tom Yum Gai.
1. In a large pot, combine chicken drumsticks, garlic, onions/shallots, lemon grass, sugar, lime juice, and chili (if using).
2. Add fish sauce to taste.
3. Pour in chicken stock and bring to a simmer.
4. Cook for 10-15 minutes until the chicken is cooked through.
5. Garnish with chopped fresh coriander before serving.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
